per_outcome.operationalization: Survey response on 5-point scale from -2 (major decrease) to +2 (major increase) for perceived productivity change since Copilot access
Number of commits per developer per week, counted from GitHub repositories with zero-commit weeks imputed as 0
Number of lines of code added per developer per week, aggregated from commit data
Number of lines of code deleted per developer per week, aggregated from commit data
Net lines per week (insertions minus deletions), measured as difference between post-adoption and pre-adoption averages
Composite measure of developer activity comparing Copilot users versus non-users before and after adoption; specific operationalization not specified
